title: Punitive policy adopted to be imposed on the ASU colleges for the academic session 2026-27 (applied to Unani UG)

aebas.description: AEBAS not implemented, partially implemented or improperly functional -> denial of permission for the concerned academic year

teaching-faculty.description: For each deficient teaching faculty, reduce intake strength by 5% of total intake capacity

teaching-department-empty.description: Denial of permission if any teaching department has not even a single teaching faculty during assessment

non-teaching.description: Seat reduction for deficiency in non-teaching staff (excluding Group D staff)

hospital-staff.description: Seat reduction for deficiency in hospital staff (excluding Group D staff)

central-registration.description: Non-availability of Computerized Central Registration system -> reduce intake strength by one seat

opd-average.description: For every 10% deficiency in average attendance of patients in OPD per day -> one seat

bed-occupancy.description: For every 1% deficiency in bed occupancy -> one seat

hospital-functionality.description: Deficiency in functionality of hospital -> reduce intake strength by 30%

aggregation.description: All deficiencies are added; if the calculated seat reduction exceeds 50% of intake the college is denied permission for the academic session
